title: Chorizo and Spicy Cheddar Frittata
description: A spicy frittata packed with chorizo and cheddar cheese, perfect for a hearty breakfast.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook chorizo over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, crumbly cheddar cheese, salt, and pepper.
Add cooked chorizo to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour egg mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
Sprinkle spicy cheddar cheese on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
